items.name: Internal Growth Holistic Psychology
items.reason: Homepage says the practice is at full capacity and unable to take on new clients.

providerCandidate.name: Internal Growth Holistic Psychology
providerCandidate.fit: Greymouth clinical psychology practice offering assessment, trauma-informed therapy, EMDR, neurodiversity assessments, supervision, and ACC-related support. Add to live providers only when the practice is accepting new clients.
providerCandidate.firstStep: Use the website contact form and ask whether new-client enquiries are open, what the first appointment costs, and whether ACC or private therapy fits.

items.notes: Do not add as a live first-contact option until availability changes.

items.name: Dr Michelle McCarthy

providerCandidate.name: Dr Michelle McCarthy
providerCandidate.fit: Christchurch PsychMed clinical psychologist specialising in anxiety, including generalised anxiety, OCD, social anxiety, health anxiety, pregnancy and postnatal mental health, and work-related stress or burnout. Add back to live providers only when accepting new clients.
providerCandidate.firstStep: Email or call Christchurch PsychMed asking about current availability, fees, and whether Michelle is accepting new clients.

items.notes: Removed from live provider results while unavailable.
